title: selinum spinosum
intro: Selinum spinosum, also known as wild celery or Queen Anne's lace, is a type of biennial plant belonging to the carrot family. Its medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like limonene and pinene, having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. This plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Selinum spinosum is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
